source_rationale: Protamine 1 is a key chromatin remodeling protein expressed during spermatid elongation as histones are replaced
Protamine 2 is co-expressed with PRM1 during spermatid elongation for chromatin compaction
Transition protein 1 is expressed during spermatid elongation as an intermediate step between histone-to-protamine replacement
Transition protein 2 functions alongside TNP1 during chromatin condensation in elongating spermatids
Acrosomal vesicle protein 1 is expressed during acrosome formation in elongating spermatids
Outer dense fiber protein 1 is a structural component of the sperm tail expressed during spermatid elongation
Outer dense fiber protein 2 is expressed in elongating spermatids as the flagellar structure forms
Spermatid maturation 1 is specifically expressed in elongating spermatids and is essential for cytoplasm removal
Von Willebrand factor is a glycoprotein produced predominantly by endothelial cells and is a canonical endothelial marker
CD31/PECAM1 is an adhesion molecule highly expressed on endothelial cell junctions
VE-cadherin is an endothelial-specific adherens junction protein critical for vascular integrity
VEGFR2/KDR is the primary receptor for VEGF signaling and is highly expressed on endothelial cells
VEGFR1/FLT1 is a VEGF receptor expressed on endothelial cells involved in angiogenesis
ERG is an ETS family transcription factor that is a master regulator of endothelial gene expression
Claudin 5 is a tight junction protein enriched in endothelial cells
Endomucin is a sialomucin expressed on the luminal surface of endothelial cells
PDGFR-beta is a canonical pericyte marker expressed on mural cells surrounding blood vessels
Collagen type I alpha 1 is expressed in fibroblast-like pericytes reflecting their extracellular matrix-producing phenotype
Collagen type I alpha 2 is co-expressed with COL1A1 in fibroblast-like pericytes
Decorin is a proteoglycan expressed by fibroblast-like pericytes involved in ECM organization
Lumican is an ECM proteoglycan enriched in fibroblast-like pericytes
PDGFR-alpha marks fibroblast-like stromal cells and is expressed in F-pericytes in the testis
Cytoglobin is expressed in pericytes and stellate cells with fibroblast-like properties
Cholesterol side-chain cleavage enzyme is essential for steroidogenesis and marks Leydig cell lineage
Steroidogenic acute regulatory protein mediates cholesterol transport and is expressed in steroidogenic Leydig cells
3-beta-hydroxysteroid dehydrogenase is a steroidogenic enzyme expressed in Leydig cells
SF1/NR5A1 is a transcription factor that drives steroidogenic gene expression in Leydig cells
Insulin-like 3 is a Leydig cell-specific peptide hormone, though expressed at lower levels in immature cells
Delta-like 1 homolog is a marker of immature/progenitor Leydig cells that decreases with maturation
PDGFR-alpha is expressed in Leydig cell progenitors and immature Leydig cells in the testicular interstitium
17-alpha-hydroxylase is a steroidogenic enzyme expressed in Leydig cells for androgen biosynthesis
Alpha smooth muscle actin is a canonical marker of contractile mural/pericyte cells
Smooth muscle myosin heavy chain 11 is expressed in contractile myoid-type pericytes
PDGFR-beta is a canonical pericyte marker expressed on perivascular mural cells
Regulator of G-protein signaling 5 is highly expressed in pericytes and vascular smooth muscle cells
Transgelin/SM22 is a smooth muscle marker expressed in contractile pericytes
NG2/CSPG4 is a proteoglycan expressed on pericytes and is a well-established pericyte marker
Desmin is an intermediate filament protein expressed in contractile/myoid pericytes
CD68 is a lysosomal glycoprotein highly expressed in macrophages and monocytes
CD163 is a scavenger receptor that serves as a specific marker for tissue-resident macrophages
Colony stimulating factor 1 receptor is essential for macrophage differentiation and survival
Allograft inflammatory factor 1 (IBA1) is a calcium-binding protein expressed in macrophages
MARCO is a scavenger receptor expressed on tissue-resident macrophages
Complement C1q subcomponent A is highly expressed in tissue-resident macrophages
Complement C1q subcomponent B is co-expressed with C1QA in macrophages
ADGRE1 (EMR1) is an adhesion G protein-coupled receptor expressed on macrophages
Macrophage scavenger receptor 1 (CD204) is expressed on macrophages for modified lipoprotein uptake
CD45/PTPRC is a pan-leukocyte marker expressed on all immune cells including macrophages
Alpha smooth muscle actin is a canonical marker of peritubular myoid cells surrounding seminiferous tubules
Smooth muscle myosin heavy chain is expressed in contractile peritubular myoid cells
Desmin is an intermediate filament protein expressed in peritubular myoid cells
Transgelin is a smooth muscle-associated protein expressed in peritubular myoid cells
Calponin 1 is a smooth muscle-specific protein expressed in peritubular myoid cells
Tropomyosin 2 is expressed in smooth muscle-like peritubular myoid cells
Myosin light chain kinase is involved in smooth muscle contraction and expressed in myoid cells
Acrosin is a serine protease expressed in the acrosome of round spermatids
Acrosomal vesicle protein 1 is expressed during acrosome biogenesis in round spermatids
Sperm acrosome associated 1 is specifically expressed in round spermatids during acrosome formation
CREM is a transcription factor with a testis-specific activator isoform highly expressed in round spermatids
Testis expressed 14 is involved in intercellular bridges and expressed in post-meiotic spermatids
Lysozyme-like 4 is a testis-specific gene expressed in round spermatids
IZUMO1 is a sperm-egg fusion protein that begins expression in round spermatids
Zona pellucida binding protein is expressed in round spermatids during acrosome development
Calmegin is a testis-specific chaperone expressed in spermatids
Synaptonemal complex protein 3 is a meiosis-specific structural protein essential for chromosome synapsis in spermatocytes
Synaptonemal complex protein 1 is a central element of the synaptonemal complex in meiotic spermatocytes
SPO11 initiates meiotic recombination by creating double-strand breaks in spermatocytes
DMC1 is a meiosis-specific recombinase essential for homologous recombination in spermatocytes
MLH1 marks crossover sites during meiotic recombination in spermatocytes
PIWIL1 is involved in piRNA biogenesis and transposon silencing during meiosis in spermatocytes
Testis expressed 12 is a synaptonemal complex component expressed in meiotic spermatocytes
RAD51-associated protein 2 is a meiosis-specific gene expressed in spermatocytes
Meiosis-specific protein with OB-fold is essential for meiotic recombination in spermatocytes
OVOL2 is a transcription factor expressed during meiotic progression in spermatocytes
PLZF/ZBTB16 is a transcription factor essential for spermatogonial stem cell self-renewal
DMRT1 is a transcription factor critical for spermatogonial maintenance and differentiation decisions
Undifferentiated embryonic cell transcription factor 1 is expressed in undifferentiated spermatogonia
GDNF family receptor alpha 1 is a receptor for GDNF signaling in spermatogonial stem cells
ID4 is a transcription factor marking the most primitive spermatogonial stem cells
CD90/THY1 is a surface marker used to enrich for spermatogonial stem cells
MAGE-A4 is a cancer-testis antigen expressed broadly in spermatogonia
PLZF is a canonical marker of undifferentiated spermatogonia and spermatogonial stem cells
GFRA1 marks spermatogonial stem cells responsive to GDNF signaling
ID4 is enriched in the most primitive undifferentiated spermatogonia
UTF1 is expressed in undifferentiated spermatogonia
FGFR3 is expressed in undifferentiated spermatogonia and marks self-renewing populations
NANOS2 is an RNA-binding protein essential for spermatogonial stem cell maintenance
KIT/c-Kit is upregulated in differentiating spermatogonia transitioning from undifferentiated state
DMRT1 is expressed in spermatogonia and plays a role in differentiation decisions
MAGE-A4 is broadly expressed in spermatogonia including differentiating populations
STRA8 is a retinoic acid-responsive gene marking spermatogonia committed to differentiation
SOHLH1 is a transcription factor expressed in differentiating spermatogonia
SOHLH2 is a bHLH transcription factor involved in spermatogonial differentiation
CD3 delta is a component of the T cell receptor complex and a canonical T cell marker
CD3 epsilon is essential for T cell receptor signaling and marks all T cells
CD3 gamma is part of the TCR complex expressed on all T cells
CD2 is a surface glycoprotein expressed on T cells involved in cell adhesion
T cell receptor alpha constant region is specifically expressed in T cells
T cell receptor beta constant 1 is expressed in T cells as part of the TCR
IL-7 receptor alpha is expressed on T cells and is important for T cell homeostasis
LCK is a Src family kinase essential for T cell receptor signaling
CD45 is a pan-leukocyte marker expressed on T cells
KIT expression increases as spermatogonia transition from undifferentiated to differentiating states
DMRT1 is expressed during spermatogonial transition and regulates differentiation
NANOS3 is an RNA-binding protein expressed in transitioning spermatogonia
SOHLH1 is a transcription factor that promotes spermatogonial differentiation
MAGE-A4 is expressed across spermatogonial stages including transitioning populations
DAZL is an RNA-binding protein expressed in germ cells during spermatogonial transition
KIT marks differentiating spermatogonia and is progressively upregulated during transition
STRA8 is induced by retinoic acid in spermatogonia committing to meiotic entry
SOHLH2 is a bHLH transcription factor expressed in differentiating spermatogonia
DMRT1 continues to be expressed during spermatogonial differentiation
DAZL is an RNA-binding protein important for germ cell development in transitioning spermatogonia
MAGE-A4 is expressed in spermatogonia at various stages of differentiation
STRA8 is highly expressed in late transitioning spermatogonia preparing for meiotic entry
KIT is expressed in differentiating spermatogonia at advanced transitional stages
PRDM9 is a histone methyltransferase that begins expression in late spermatogonia approaching meiosis
REC8 is a meiotic cohesin that begins expression in pre-leptotene spermatogonia transitioning to meiosis
DAZL is expressed in germ cells and is important for the transition to meiosis
SOHLH1 promotes spermatogonial differentiation in late transitioning cells
ID4 is a hallmark marker of the most primitive Asingle spermatogonial stem cells
GFRA1 is a GDNF co-receptor marking undifferentiated type A spermatogonia with stem cell properties
PLZF/ZBTB16 is essential for spermatogonial stem cell self-renewal in undifferentiated type A cells
UTF1 is a transcription factor expressed in undifferentiated spermatogonia
NANOS2 is an RNA-binding protein critical for maintaining the undifferentiated spermatogonial state
FGFR3 is expressed in undifferentiated spermatogonia and marks self-renewing stem cells
ETV5 is an ETS transcription factor involved in spermatogonial stem cell self-renewal
SALL4 is a transcription factor expressed in undifferentiated spermatogonia
PLZF remains expressed in undifferentiated type A spermatogonia at various stages
GFRA1 is expressed in undifferentiated spermatogonia though may decrease in Apaired/Aaligned cells
SALL4 is expressed in undifferentiated spermatogonia including Apaired and Aaligned stages
NANOS3 is expressed in undifferentiated spermatogonia and supports germ cell survival
UTF1 is expressed in undifferentiated spermatogonia
LIN28A is an RNA-binding protein expressed in undifferentiated spermatogonia
DMRT1 is expressed in undifferentiated spermatogonia and regulates the balance between self-renewal and differentiation
FGFR3 marks undifferentiated spermatogonia responsive to FGF signaling
KIT/c-Kit is strongly expressed in type B spermatogonia committed to differentiation
STRA8 is a retinoic acid-induced gene marking spermatogonia committed to meiotic entry
PCNA is a proliferation marker highly expressed in actively dividing type B spermatogonia
Ki-67 marks proliferating cells and is expressed in mitotically active type B spermatogonia
SOHLH1 is a transcription factor required for spermatogonial differentiation in type B cells
SOHLH2 promotes differentiation and is expressed in type B spermatogonia
DAZL is an RNA-binding protein expressed in differentiating germ cells including type B spermatogonia
DMRT1 is expressed in type B spermatogonia and regulates the transition to meiosis
